case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. TYSON DIRKSEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200017210) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200017034) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DIRKSEN, TYSON EVOLVE BUILDING INC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-03-2020
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200016798) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-03-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
